svg.aria-label: Kandji MDM macOS hardening, FIDO2 + ISMS-P.
svg.title: 2025-05-02: Kandji MDM macOS hardening guide

g.text: Direct device access : no central policy :...
Shadow IT on macOS : ungoverned app installs : no...
FileVault not enforced : Gatekeeper bypassed : no SIP...
Blueprint policy push : app auto-deploy : Gatekeeper +...
Passkey FIDO2/WebAuthn : YubiKey + Touch ID : device trust...
AI threat detection : anomaly auto-response : predictive...
